creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
Can you check and make sure you haven't modified the default torrc to 
have a group in it.  Also check and make sure rc.d/tor doesn't contain a 
group.  Group went away in 2.1.7 and while I updated the port to reflect 
this, if you are using an older or custom torrc you will hit this problem.
